div1.entryFree:
Taxation, 1) the act of loading with imposts: R2 II, 1, 260. H8 I, 2, 30. H8 I, 2, 30 H8 I, 2, 30 H8 I, 2, 30
2) demand, claim (cf. tax vb. 2): I bring no overture of war, no t. of homage, Tw. I, 5, 225.
3) censure, satire, invective: you'll be whipped for t. one of these days, As I, 2, 91.
